## Skill Contribution

### Type
- [ ] New Skill
- [ ] Amendment to existing skill
- [ ] Bug fix / correction

### Skill name
<!-- e.g., rebuild-plugins-before-deploy -->

### Description
<!-- What does this skill do? What error does it prevent? -->

### Source
<!-- How was this discovered? (e.g., "Debugging a silent deploy failure on staging") -->
<!-- No need to share details — just enough context for reviewers -->

### Checklist
- [ ] Anonymized: no secrets, tokens, personal data, or project-specific names
- [ ] SKILL.md format is correct (YAML frontmatter + required sections)
- [ ] Tested: the described actions actually solve the described problem
- [ ] Checked for duplicates: ran `match-existing` or manually reviewed INDEX.md
- [ ] For amendments: AMENDMENT.yaml targets the correct skill and version

### Additional context
<!-- Screenshots, links, or anything else that helps reviewers -->
